# CWE-279 — Incorrect Execution-Assigned Permissions (vulnerable)
lang: go
file: CWE-279-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"os"
	"strconv"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// Vulnerable: forces world-writable mode regardless of user preference.
func StoreUpload(c *gin.Context) {
	modeStr := c.PostForm("mode")
	mode, _ := strconv.ParseUint(modeStr, 8, 32)
	path := "/data/uploads/" + c.PostForm("name")
	_ = os.WriteFile(path, []byte(c.PostForm("body")), 0777)
	_ = mode
	c.JSON(200, gin.H{"path": path})
}
